basics.name: Gregory Sainton
basics.label: Research Engineer in Machine Learning
basics.summary: Research Engineer in Machine Learning at Observatoire de Paris (LUX Team). PhD in Astrophysics. Working on SKA radioastronomy source detection and peatland cartography. Former planetary science engineer on NASA InSight and FSS missions at IPGP.

work.name: Observatoire de Paris - LUX Team
work.summary: Machine learning research applied to astrophysics and Earth observation.
highlights: SKA (Square Kilometre Array) - ML algorithms for automated source detection in radio data
Development of CIANNA_OTF, a client-server system for asynchronous batched inference on FITS images (IVOA UWS)

work.name: Institut de Physique du Globe de Paris (IPGP)
work.position: Research Engineer - Planetology and Space Sciences Lab
work.summary: Research engineering for planetary science missions.
highlights: NASA InSight mission - ML algorithms for seismic signal analysis (LSTM, Deep Scattering Networks, CNNs/YOLOv4)
Development of the SEIS data processing, visualisation and reporting pipeline
Instrument control software for optical seismometer test bench (PIONEERS / Horizons 2020)
NASA FSS mission - AIT of the Lunar seismometer, vibration tests of flight and qualification models
Administration of CPU/GPU computing servers and GitLab platform for the team
Selection and administration of document management system for IPGP (IN2P3/ATRIUM)

work.name: Ministere de l'Education Nationale - Academie de Creteil
work.position: Primary school teacher for deaf and hearing-impaired children
work.summary: Primary school teacher specialised in deaf and hearing-impaired children.
highlights: Adapted teaching methods and materials to individual student needs
Collaborated with parents, specialists, and educators to support student learning
On secondment (mise en disponibilite) from July 2018 to August 2023

work.name: Groupama Asset Management
work.summary: Project management and IT consulting in asset management.
highlights: Management of tender processes and supplier selection
Project team management (15 people), project oversight (3M euros budget)
System reliability control including security and business continuity planning

work.name: BNP Paribas Asset Management
work.summary: IT consulting and software development in asset management.
highlights: Functional and technical specifications for risk calculation software
Development of order routing modules for derivatives and portfolio management (Java/Oracle)
Development of portfolio performance attribution modules (Java/Oracle)
User training (20 people) and compliance software deployment

education.institution: Universite Pierre et Marie Curie, Paris
courses: Spectroscopie des supernovae a grand decalage vers le rouge
Collaborations: Supernovae Cosmology Project (SCP) and Supernovae Legacy Survey (SNLS)

education.area: Particules, Noyaux, Atomes et Photons - IP2I
courses: Internship: Spectroscopy of type Ia supernovae with VLT/FORS1
Internship: Calibration of the Faber-Jackson relation using Cepheids

certificates.name: Techniques et technologies de vehicules spatiaux (70h)

interests.name: Astronomy
keywords: Member of SAF (Societe Astronomique de France)
Currently building a 250mm Dobson telescope including mirror polishing
